reviews.comment:
Tienen q prestar mas atencion a los baños q son bastante roñosos. A los payeros les falta instrucciones, cargan de a un auto cuando el sutidor automático les permite hacerlo de a dos como en CABA. El resto bien

(Translated by Google)
They need to pay more attention to the restrooms, which are quite filthy. The attendants lack instructions; they fill up one car at a time when the automatic pump allows them to do two at a time, like in Buenos Aires. Otherwise, everything was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNS1EZU53EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños un desastre. Sin papel, sin jabón, el piso un solo charco. Tienen un hermoso parque pero un cartel dice " prohibido comer en el parque". Comimos sobre un paredón cerca del playón. El pasto alrededor estaba con mucha basura.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were a disaster. No toilet paper, no soap, and the floor was just one big puddle. They have a beautiful park, but a sign says "No eating in the park." We ate on a wall near the playground. The grass around it was littered with trash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNmZfWUJnEAE
